Off Calendar Nov-18-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Judge: Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
S. Samantha Sepehr, Esq. of Steele George Schofield & Ramos LLP (925-280-1700), counsel for plaintiff
Brenda Cruz Keith, Esq. (415-626-6494), counsel for defendant/demurring party Equity Growth
Seth J. Feinberg, Esq. (510-900-3925), counsel for defendants Tony Wong and Sandra Wong
Edward E. Smith, Esq. of Steyer Lowenthal Boodrookas, et al LLP, (415-421-3400), counsel for defendant/demurring party Old Republic

All sides submit and the Court Adopts the Tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT OLD REPUBLIC TITLE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Sustained. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend as to the following causes of action: with leave to amend: (1) fraud, wrongful foreclosure, and B&P 17200 is sustained with leave to amend to allege fraud with requisite particularity as to moving defendant and to allege all elements of B&P 17200 cause of action; (2) conversion - to allege the amount allegedly converted by the moving defendant for defendant's own use; (3) good faith and fair dealing - to allege all elements of this cause of action; (4) breach of fiduciary duty and negligence - to allege duty; (5) Rosenthal Act-sustained with leave to amend to alleged fact re: Old Republic being a debt collector within the meaning of the Act; (6) injunctive relief- to re-plead as a remedy. Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to quiet title cause of action, no opposition filed. Written order is signed and filed in open court.
